text:
Created attachment 147025
Update .shar

(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
> Thanks for your submission Maxim.
> 
> Initial review items:
> 
>  * Use OPTIONS helpers: MPTABLE_MAKE_ARGS
Done.

>  * Add LICENSE_FILE is a standalone license exists in the distribution files
Nope, there's just Makefile and *.{c,h}

>  * Strip trailing slash from pkg-descr WWW: URL
Wat. It points to a directory on a web server with index.html, not a file or something else.

>  
> If possible please also include the following to promote quick 
> resolution:
> 
>  * Attach successful poudriere testport, or redports.org build logs
Will do soon.
>  * portlint -AC output (after addressing any outstanding issues)

WARN: /mnt/ext_hdd/poudriere/ports/default/net/ng_mikrotik_eoip/pkg-plist: [2]: installing to directory / discouraged. could you please avoid it?
WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/boot/modules".
WARN: Makefile: possible direct use of "files" "IGNORE=         requires kernel source files" found. if so, use ${FILESDIR} instead.
0 fatal errors and 3 warnings found.
